query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(14,2))) as soma_totalAmount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(totalFinal AS DECIMAL(14,2)) > 0 THEN CAST(totalFinal AS DECIMAL(14,2)) ELSE CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2)) END) as soma_totalFinal
FROM quotes;
command:

  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(totalFinal AS DECIMAL(14,2)) > 0 THEN CAST(totalFinal AS DECIMAL(14,2)) ELSE CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2)) END) as soma_totalFinal
FROM quotes;
